X0300_CRCTN_SEX_CD X0300 Correction Sex Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the resident's sex from the prior erroneous record to be modified or inactivated. -=Not assessed/no information/unable to determine
1=Male
2=Female
^=Blank (Skip Pattern) effective 10/01/2023
discontinued 9/30/2025
609 X0400_CRCTN_BIRTH_DT X0400_CRCTN_BIRTH_DT X0400 Correction Birth Date CHAR 8 The data in this column indicates the resident's birth date from the prior erroneous record to be modified or
